description: A wrapper around Node.js EventEmitter with built-in logging and registry management.

params.name: eventName
params.description: The name/identifier for this event type.

callback.description: A callback function triggered whenever a log entry is added.

emit.description: Emits an event and logs the action.

addListener.description: Adds a listener for a specific event type.

destroy.description: Stops the emitter, removes listeners, and clears from registry.

getAllEvents.description: Returns an array of all active Event instances.

clearAllEvents.description: Terminates and removes all active Event instances.
